title: Spanish Chicken Paella
description: A classic Spanish dish made with chicken, rice, and vegetables. This paella recipe is a hearty and flavorful meal that's perfect for a family dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pan and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the artichoke hearts, chicken broth, saffron, and smoked paprika. Stir to combine.
Add the rice to the pan and stir to coat with the liquid.
Return the chicken to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
